channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 8 com severidade Alta
• 4 novas CVEs
• 2 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-55229 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Gotenberg is a Docker-powered stateless API for PDF files. Prior to 8.34.0, Gotenberg's /forms/libreoffice/convert endpoint allows a specially crafted document to cause LibreOffice to automatically retrieve external HTTP(S) resources and local file resources during document conversion, enabling blind SSRF and limited local file disclosure via linked image resource loading.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-55229
 
🚨 Active Exploitation Alert: Critical CVE-2026-20896 Authentication Bypass in Gitea Docker Image Exposes Repositories and Secrets - Rescana
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-20896 associada a Docker. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
💣 Hackers Exploit Critical Auth Bypass in Gitea Docker Image - Security Boulevard
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Docker. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMingFBVV95cUxQZDRNM09BRDJHUjB4REhPcUVCVXY4VEs3YUN2WmstbGFyRnA3bUpyVDNwV0x3RUwxNUp0U0RBMlVYcEJlTTEwNGZ4a2JRRjdLdE13OGFjeDNMVzI1RmZqS0xZR2lCbjJoODN1ZmEtR1ZmQnFtV08xZzZwSmhtYS0xSHduVG9sWlZvcGdNZkN1QklPbTB6SFgwNkFYZzZiQQ?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

📰 Hackers Weaponize Balochistan Police Portal in Multi-Group Espionage Campaigns
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of sustained cyber espionage activity against several Pakistani law enforcement organizations undertaken by suspected China- and India-aligned threat actors between February 2024 and April 2026. "At Balochistan Police, the compromised assets included servers hosting web applications that manage police and citizen data, such as criminal and
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/hackers-weaponize-balochistan-police.html
 
📰 Six New U-Boot Flaws Could Let Malicious Images Crash Devices or Run Code at Boot
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Researchers at firmware security firm Binarly have found six new flaws in U-Boot, the small program that starts up hardware as varied as home routers, smart cameras, and the management chips inside data-center servers. The other two could let an attacker who slips a malicious image in front of the bootloader run their own code, before the device
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/07/six-new-u-boot-flaws-could-let.html
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 Januscape vulnerability CVE-2026-53359 mitigations available
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/blog/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Introduction A local privilege escalation (LPE) vulnerability affecting the Linux kernel was publicly disclosed on July 6, 2026. The vulnerability was assigned CVE ID CVE-2026-53359 and is referred to as Januscape. This vulnerability affects all Ubuntu releases. Neither NVD nor Kernel.org have published their own CVSS scores for this issue; we calculated it as CVSS […]
Link: https://ubuntu.com//blog/januscape-linux-vulnerability-mitigations-available
 
🚨 CVE-2026-1667 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.2
Resumo:
The SEO Plugin by Squirrly SEO plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Arbitrary Post Creation and Stored Cross-Site Scripting in all versions up to, and including, 14.0.0 due to a leak of an API token and insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to create arbitrary posts, and, if the Advanced Custom Fields plugin is installed and activated, inject arbitr...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-1667
 
💣 Active Exploitation Alert: WP-SHELLSTORM Campaign Mass-Compromises WordPress Sites via Plugin Vulnerabilities - Rescana
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo WordPress. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 10/07/2026 até 12/07/2026.
